zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomeus Schumacher於1729年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格時，他的父親Andreas Rudolph Schumacher36歲，母親Elizabeth Cloninger34歲。他於大約1755年與Anna Maria Barbara在美國馬里蘭州弗雷德里克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1761年住在美國維吉尼亞州盧度洛維次維爾且於1765年住在喀麥隆艾斯特布巴-吉格可劍橋大學默里 堂。他於1707年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1793年9月2日在美國賓夕法尼亞州華盛頓享年64歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州盧度。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomeus Schumacher于1729年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格时，他的父亲Andreas Rudolph Schumacher36岁，母亲Elizabeth Cloninger34岁。他于大约1755年与Anna Maria Barbara在美国马里兰州弗雷德里克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1761年住在美国弗吉尼亚州盧度洛維次維爾且于1765年住在喀麦隆艾斯特布巴-吉格可劍橋大學默里 堂。他于1707年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1793年9月2日在美国宾夕法尼亚州華盛頓享年64岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Schumacher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Bernd, Klaus, Alois, Erwin, Fritz, Horst, Juergen, Bernhard, Ewald.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a shoemaker, from Middle High German schuoch ‘shoe’, German Schuh + an agent derivative of machen ‘to make’. This surname is also found in Denmark and Sweden.

variants.name: Schuhmacher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Inge, Juergen.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schumacher  .

variants.name: Shumake
meanings: Altered form of German Schumach, a variant of Schumacher .

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomeus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.description: England, Austria, Saxony and the Netherlands formed an alliance against Russia.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Alliance with American Colonies
historicEvents.description: After the battle of Saratoga France realized that America might be worth backing. They formed an alliance with the colonies and sent naval fleets to help with the war.
A four year war with England was fought.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomeus Schumacher was born in 1729, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Andreas Rudolph Schumacher, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Cloninger, was 34. He married Anna Maria Barbara about 1755, in Frederick, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virginia, United States in 1761 and New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, East, Cameroon in 1765. He registered for military service in 1707. He died about 2 September 1793, in Washington, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 64, and was buried in Loudoun, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomeus Schumacher est né en 1729, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Andreas Rudolph Schumacher, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cloninger, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Anna Maria Barbara environ 1755, à Frederick, Maryland, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virginie, États-Unis en 1761 et à New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, Est, Cameroun en 1765. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1707. Il est décédé environ 2 septembre 1793, à Washington, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Loudoun, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.Allen, Pennsylvania, United States: Allen, Monroe Township, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomeus Schumacher 1729 in Kleeburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andreas Rudolph Schumacher 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cloninger 34. Er hat um 1755 in Frederick, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten Anna Maria Barbara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1761 hat er in Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und 1765 in New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, Est, Kamerun gelebt. Er hat sich 1707 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 2. September 1793 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Washington, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Loudoun, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomeus Schumacher è nato il nel 1729 nel Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Andreas Rudolph Schumacher, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cloninger, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Anna Maria Barbara circa 1755, nel Frederick, Maryland, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1761 e nel New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, Est, Camerun nel 1765. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1707. Morì circa 2 settembre 1793, nel Washington, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Loudoun, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomeus Schumacherが1729年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグで生まれた時，父Andreas Rudolph Schumacherは36歳，母Elizabeth Cloningerは34歳であった。約1755年にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州フレデリックでAnna Maria Barbaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1761年にはアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ロウドウンロベッツヴィルに，1765年にはカメルーンエストボウンバ-エト-ンゴコニュー トウンに住んでいた。彼は1707年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1793年9月2日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ワシュイントンで64歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Frederick, Maryland, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 프레더릭크

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomeus Schumacher(이)가 1729년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andreas Rudolph Schumacher(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cloninger(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1755년 미국 메릴랜드 주 프레더릭크에서 Anna Maria Barbara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1761년도에 미국 버지니아 주 루다운 러베츠빌에서, 1765년도에 카메룬 에스트 부바-트-그옥오 뉴 타운에서 살았다. 그는 1707년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1793년 9월 2일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 와신그턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 루다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomeus Schumacher nasceu em 1729, em Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Andreas Rudolph Schumacher, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cloninger, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Maria Barbara aproximadamente 1755, em Frederick, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América em 1761 e em New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, Est, Camarões em 1765. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1707. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 2 de setembro de 1793, em Washington, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Loudoun, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Allen, Pennsylvania, United States: аллен, монро тоуншип, кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomeus Schumacher родился в 1729 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Andreas Rudolph Schumacher было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cloninger, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Maria Barbara около 1755 г. в местности фредирикк, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности лаветцвилл, лоудоун, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в 1761 году и в местности ню тоун, боумба-ет-нгоко, эст, Камерун в 1765 году. В 1707 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 2 сентября 1793 г. в местности вашингтон, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудоун, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomeus Schumacher nació en 1729, en Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Andreas Rudolph Schumacher, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cloninger, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Anna Maria Barbara aproximadamente 1755, en Frederick, Maryland, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Lovettsville, Loudoun, Virginia, Estados Unidos en 1761 y en New Town, Boumba-et-Ngoko, Est, Camerún en 1765. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1707. Murió aproximadamente 2 de septiembre de 1793, en Washington, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Loudoun, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
